channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: There are early signs of renewed labor market strength during Iran war
item.description: The 1970s oil-shock playbook needs an update: Inflation costs persist, but employment risks appear much smaller than 50 years ago.

item.title: New World screwworm detected in Texas, renewing cattle industry concerns
item.description: A deadly livestock pest, the New World screwworm, has been found in Texas for the first time in 60 years.

item.title: Trump to formally nominate Todd Blanche as attorney general
item.description: President Trump plans to nominate acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to lead the Justice Department, with paperwork expected Thursday.

item.title: Federal inspector reports chokehold, pen stabbing at ICE facility
item.description: A federal inspection found a prohibited chokehold, an officer stabbing a detainee with a pen, and other health and safety issues.
